warnings: Phase 19 full-dimensional demographic grid is present, but it is a constrained estimate, not certified true KNBS constituency cells.
MRP-lite v2 is an aggregate diagnostic and should not be used for individual voter profiling or microtargeting.
Official 2013 county candidate-vote rows and MP results remain incomplete, limiting back-test calibration.

line_by_line_completion.note: Generates national, county, and constituency aggregate proxy estimates.

290 geography-only constituency bridge cells, 3 accepted demographic cells, and 10440 Phase 19 full-grid cells; estimated full-grid cells: 10440; independent true KNBS cells: 3; constituency coverage from true KNBS cells: 0/290.
Phase 19 supplies a full-dimensional estimated grid, but true MRP still requires certified KNBS constituency/sub-county cells and model validation.
Requires complete 2013/2017 historical rows and pre-election poll archive.
